behavior_summary: Provides the short examine/"U8P_KEY::look at" description for a key item and delegates key usage to a keyring handler.

U8P_KEY::look chooses a single-line bark based on the item's quality code (Item::getQuality(this)), with many quality codes mapping to a generic "key" text and a handful mapping to specific names like "silver mine key", "Key of the Conventicler", "Devon's key", "Disciple's key", "Acolyte's key", and "Master's key".
After emitting the selected bark the U8P_KEY::look process suspends (ends).

U8P_KEY::use does not implement U8P_KEY::use logic itself; it immediately calls the keyring handler KEYRING::func0119 and then suspends, delegating any U8P_KEY::use/equip/open behavior to that external routine.
No global flags are read or written by these functions; behavior is local to the item instance and the keyring call.
notable_control_flow: U8P_KEY::look: read item quality (via Item::getQuality(this)), select one bark from many possibilities, show bark, then suspend.
U8P_KEY::use: call KEYRING::func0119, then suspend (no branching or menus).
No conditional game-state flags or menu interactions gate these behaviors; selection is purely data-driven from the item's quality code.
open_questions: Exact mapping of numeric quality codes to each specific bark string (the script shows examples but the full mapping and codes are not present).
Whether KEYRING::func0119 receives the 'this' item handle implicitly or via other context and what precise side effects (equip vs open vs transfer) it performs.
If any quality codes encode additional metadata (ownership, bound/unbound) that would change behavior beyond choosing a bark (no flags observed here).

main_function.name: U8P_KEY::look
main_function.purpose: When the player inspects the key item, select and display a one-line description/bark determined by the item's quality value.
entry_conditions: Invoked when the player uses the 'U8P_KEY::look' / examine action on the key item (processType 0x0208).

function_map.name: U8P_KEY::look
function_map.role: Provide the examine/description text for the key based on Item::getQuality(this).

function_map.name: U8P_KEY::use
function_map.role: Delegate 'U8P_KEY::use' handling for this key to the keyring handler (no inline U8P_KEY::use logic).

function_map.name: KEYRING::func0119
function_map.role: External keyring routine that actually performs key management or U8P_KEY::use (equip/open/transfer) for the player's keyring.

external_calls.purpose: Read this item's quality code to decide which bark/description to display.
Perform the actual key U8P_KEY::use/management; U8P_KEY::use acts as a thin delegator to keyring logic.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides the short examine/"U8P_KEY::look at" description for a key item and delegates key usage to a keyring handler.
